# OathScore - Complete Documentation

> Every API makes promises. OathScore checks the receipts.

## Overview

OathScore provides two services for AI trading agents:

1. **`/now` Endpoint**: A single API call returning the current state of the world -- exchange status, volatility readings, economic event countdowns, and data source health. Replaces 4-6 separate API calls.

2. **Quality Ratings**: Independent, continuous monitoring of financial data APIs. Composite scores (0-100) based on accuracy, uptime, freshness, latency, schema stability, documentation quality, and trust signals.

## Base URL

`https://api.oathscore.dev`

---

## Endpoints

### GET /now

Current world state. Free, no authentication required.

**Response fields:**

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| timestamp | string (ISO 8601) | UTC timestamp of this response |
| exchanges | object | Open/close status for CME, NYSE, NASDAQ, LSE, EUREX, TSE, HKEX |
| exchanges.{code}.status | string | "open" or "closed" |
| exchanges.{code}.next | string | Next state transition (e.g., "close 4:00 PM ET") |
| exchanges.{code}.minutes_until | integer | Minutes until next transition |
| volatility.vix | float | CBOE VIX spot |
| volatility.vix9d | float | 9-day VIX |
| volatility.vix3m | float | 3-month VIX |
| volatility.vvix | float | VIX of VIX |
| volatility.skew | float | CBOE SKEW index |
| volatility.term_structure | string | "contango", "backwardation", or "flat" |
| events.next | object | Next upcoming economic event (name, time, minutes_until, impact) |
| events.today_remaining | integer | Events remaining today |
| events.week_high_impact | integer | High-impact events this week |
| events.fomc_days_until | integer | Days until next FOMC decision |
| events.cpi_days_until | integer | Days until next CPI release |
| data_health.all_fresh | boolean | Whether all data sources are responding |
| data_health.degraded | array | List of degraded sources with reasons |
| meta.version | string | API version |
| meta.refresh_interval_seconds | integer | How often data updates (60s) |

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T20:08:00+00:00",
  "exchanges": {
    "CME": {"status": "open", "next": "close 5:00 PM CT", "minutes_until": 532},
    "NYSE": {"status": "closed", "next": "open 9:30 AM ET", "minutes_until": 808}
  },
  "volatility": {
    "vix": 18.5,
    "vix9d": 17.2,
    "vix3m": 19.8,
    "vvix": 92.3,
    "skew": 132.5,
    "term_structure": "contango"
  },
  "events": {
    "next": {"name": "ISM Manufacturing PMI", "time": "2026-03-04T15:00:00+00:00", "minutes_until": 1132, "impact": "high"},
    "today_remaining": 0,
    "week_high_impact": 5,
    "fomc_days_until": 15,
    "cpi_days_until": 8
  },
  "data_health": {"all_fresh": true, "degraded": []},
  "meta": {"version": "1.0.0", "source": "oathscore.dev", "refresh_interval_seconds": 60}
}
```

**Headers:**

| Header | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Cache-Control | public, max-age=30 |
| X-Cache-Age-Seconds | Seconds since last data refresh |
| X-Next-Refresh-Seconds | Seconds until next refresh |

**Rate limits (free tier):** 100 requests/day. No authentication required.

---

### GET /score/{api_name}

Quality score for a rated API. (Coming soon -- monitoring phase in progress.)

**Parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| api_name | string (path) | API identifier (e.g., "curistat", "alphavantage", "polygon") |

**Response:** Composite score (0-100) with component breakdown.

---

### GET /compare

Side-by-side comparison. (Coming soon.)

**Parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| apis | string (query) | Comma-separated API names |

---

### GET /health

Service health check. Always available, no auth.

---

## Rated APIs

Currently monitoring:

| API | Category | Accuracy Trackable |
|-----|----------|--------------------|
| Curistat | Futures volatility forecasting | Yes (forecasts vs actuals) |
| Alpha Vantage | Equities, macro, forex | No (data only) |
| Polygon.io | Market data, status | No (data only) |
| Finnhub | Multi-asset, calendar | Partial (calendar events) |
| Twelve Data | Market data | No (data only) |
| EODHD | Historical data | No (data only) |
| Financial Modeling Prep | Fundamentals | No (data only) |

## Scoring Methodology

Full methodology published at: https://github.com/moxiespirit/oathscore/blob/main/docs/METHODOLOGY.md

## MCP Server

Install via pip (coming soon) or configure manually:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "oathscore": {
      "command": "python",
      "args": ["-m", "oathscore_mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

## Contact

GitHub: https://github.com/moxiespirit/oathscore
